resources.string: Add models from the following providers:
Auto-fix failed; please check code manually
Calling AI model to generate extension module code...
Request timed out; please check your network and retry
Automatically fix detected errors in code.
Generate JavaScript/CSS code based on requirement description.
Check code style and best practices, providing optimization suggestions.
Preview module effects on a specified page.
Refactor and optimize code to improve readability and performance.
Scan code for security issues like XSS or unsafe eval usage.
Check JavaScript or CSS code for syntax errors. Returns an error list and fix suggestions.
Run module code on test page and return execution results.
Validate integrity and correctness of module configuration items.
Describe features in natural language\nAI will automatically generate extension module code
AI-generated code is automatically saved here
AI-generated code will be saved here
AI-assisted generation and modification of HTML/CSS/JS code
Image generation features in HTML programming
AI help you generate application code quickly
Please configure API Key in AI Settings first
API Key not found for the selected model
Please add and save a model in AI Settings first
AI helps you generate beautiful webpages quickly
AI HTML Coding: AI-assisted code generation
AI Icon Generation: AI generate app icons
AI Module Developer Agent: Natural language generation
Create a todo application using React with add, delete, mark complete, and local storage support
Build an e-commerce product list page using Vue.js with filtering, sorting, and cart functionality
Create a RESTful API service using Gin framework with route grouping, middleware, and database operations
Set up a Go microservice with gRPC interface and HTTP gateway
Create a modern personal homepage with navigation, hero section, portfolio, and contact info
Make a weather forecast app interface with city search, current weather, and 7-day forecast
Create an Express REST API service with user registration, login, JWT authentication, and CRUD interfaces
Set up a WebSocket real-time chat server with multi-room support and message broadcasting
Create a blog system using Laravel with article management, categories, tags, and comments
Set up a PHP user management system with registration, login, and role-based access control
Build a RESTful API service using FastAPI with database models, auto-docs, and auth middleware
Create a Flask web app with file upload, image processing, and download features
Develop a custom WordPress theme with homepage template, post list, and sidebar widgets
Create a WordPress plugin to add custom post types and admin settings pages
AI Settings: Unified API key and model management
Checkpoints are automatically created after each conversation
Code modified; the updated version will be used on save
Go web services and API development
Gold, Black, Emerald Green, Deep Blue
Sky Blue, Grass Green, Earth Brown, Sunset Orange
Crimson, Gold, Dark Brown, Forest Green
Starry Blue, Desert Gold, Rose Red, Pale Purple
Twilight Orange, Skyline Blue, Starlight Purple, Dawn Pink
Meadow Green, Sky Blue, Rock Gray, Campfire Orange
Configure capability tags for different scenarios
Continue development based on this code:
⚠️ Editing message will delete subsequent conversation history
Lots of white space, precise alignment, subtle gradients, rounded corners
Geometric patterns, symmetrical layout, fan shapes, metallic lines
Clouds, greenery, small cottages, soft lighting
Crests, quills, wax seals, Gothic fonts
Waves, sakura, traditional patterns, brush-stroke fonts
Lens flare, comets, dusk, delicate lighting
Auto-scroll page for easier reading of long articles
Block popups and banners on webpages
Rounded elements, soft shadows, cute icons, candy colors
Neon colors, glow effects, glitch art, grid lines, tech fonts
Dark background, light text, soft glow, high contrast
backdrop-filter: blur(), translucent backgrounds, gradients, soft borders
Colorful gradients, flow, dynamic backgrounds, circular shapes
Black and white, lots of space, clean typography, no decorations
Clean space, simple typography, soft shadows, rounded elements
Green themes, natural elements, rounded shapes, soft shadows
Glowing text, neon borders, dark background, high contrast
Double shadows (light/dark), soft background, rounded, embossed effects
☢️ Device may freeze completely requiring reboot. PackageManager might crash. Security research only.
🔴 Launcher severely lagging; device unresponsive; possible ANR
🟠 Home screen almost covered with icons; noticeable launcher lag
🟡 Significant icon increase; temporary launcher stutter
Leave empty for app name; or enter a prefix (Prefix 1, 2...)
🔓 No Limit — Inject infinite desktop icons via activity-alias
Assign random name to each icon for obfuscation

Icon Storm uses Android\'s activity-alias mechanism. Each alias has independent MAIN/LAUNCHER intents, forcing the launcher to create an icon. This is intended Android design behavior. Extremely high counts will bottleneck launcher performance.
⚠️ High icon counts may cause severe lag or freeze the target device launcher. For security research and stress testing only. Proceed with caution.
Describe features, e.g., block popup ads on webpages...
2. Model does not support current request
No API keys yet; tap top-right to add one
No saved models yet; tap top-right to add one
No saved versions\nCheckpoints are auto-created during chat
Please add an API key first
This app type does not support direct preview
Israeli AI lab; Jamba series uses SSM-Transformer architecture for long context
Claude models excel at text understanding, coding, and vision
Specially optimized for Chinese understanding; supports search retrieval
Wafer-scale engine inference; ultra-fast for Llama series
Enterprise platform; Command R+ excels at RAG and 100+ languages
Custom services compatible with OpenAI API format
Low-cost inference platform for open-source models; OpenAI compatible
High performance and cost-effective; supports text and vision
High-performance inference platform focused on low latency
GLM-4.6 series features excellent coding and multimodal capabilities
★ Recommended ★ Gemini 3.0 Pro excels at frontend code and multimodal tasks
xAI\'s Grok series supporting text and vision
Ultra-fast LPU inference; best for real-time conversation
Tencent\'s model; strong in Chinese dialogue and multimodal
Local model management tool with OpenAI compatible API
Excellent Chinese performance and voice cloning; strong coding agents
European AI leader; Mistral Large series coded for high reasoning
Highly optimized for long contexts (200K+) and code reasoning
Inference platform for LLM and image models; OpenAI compatible
Run open-source models locally for free
Strong reasoning and performance for text, vision, and DALL-E
Aggregator for multiple providers; one key for all models
AI search engine; Sonar models include real-time web search
Alibaba\'s multimodal series; strong reasoning in Qwen3
Fast cloud inference for open-source models like Llama
Chinese platform aggregating top open-source models
Free quota available; very low cost
Strong Chinese understanding and speech features; OpenAI compatible
Pay-per-use; free quota for new users
Supports ultra-long contexts (256K) and strong multimodal
Aggregates hundreds of open-source models; supports fine-tuning
Low per-model cost for open-source models
High-performance local inference engine; OpenAI compatible
Bytedance\'s model ecosystem; balanced and efficient
Kai-Fu Lee\'s startup; Yi series is balanced for EN/ZH
Request timed out; check network and retry
Revert to previous dialogue state and project code
Rolled back to: %s\nLast message pre-filled to input box
Auto-loads without UI for background operations
Operate via management panel UI or independent window
Select capabilities supported by this model
AI will generate code matching this design style
Streaming response did not complete normally
Suggestion: Try another model or check API settings
Unified control for all audio on page
Display console logs on the page
Collect all images from the page
Click images to zoom and view
Collect all links from the page
Block site permission requests for notifications
Add speed control and PiP to videos
Check code style and best practices
Create/Overwrite files for React/Vue/Next.js projects (JSX/TSX/CSS/JSON, etc.).
Create/Overwrite files for Go projects (.go/go.mod/templates, etc.).
Create/Overwrite files for Node.js projects (JS/TS/JSON, etc.).
Create/Overwrite files for PHP projects (PHP/HTML/CSS, etc.).
Create/Overwrite files for Python projects (.py/requirements/templates, etc.).
Create/Overwrite files for WordPress themes and plugins (PHP/CSS/JS, etc.).
